meaning: n.发育不全的矮小动物,矮子
examples: Animals reject the runt of the litter.
Jimmy was a sawed-off, skinny runt.
"I want that one," the little boy said, pointing to the runt.
ChevronTexaco is also a runt in terms of reserves, with 12 billion barrels of oil equivalents.
"He was a very competitive kid, a skinny little runt, " McKnight recalled.
